metadata.description: Claude Code skills and workflows for software development and engineering

plugins.name: dev-skills
plugins.description: Skills for code quality, Claude Code development, and context optimization

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: Foundational engineering principles applied to software, documentation, and process

plugins.name: pdca-workflow
plugins.description: A PM-led PDCA feedback loop for AI-assisted projects: /decide decision panel, standalone advise/verify/red-team panel primitives, /retrospect process loop, /pdca-init scaffolding with a project-tailored advisor panel, the MSH-baby ship-one-item command, a version-agnostic ADR system with a zero-dep corpus linter, a metrics-engine spec, and a muda-cutting CLAUDE.md template. Ships enforcement hooks (fan-out model guard, gate-pipe guard, ADR post-edit lint, primitive spawn-log).

plugins.name: skill-bench
plugins.description: Hermetic measurement harness for Claude Code skills: paired with/without value benchmarks, description-ablation trigger tests, blind grading with an adversarial prosecutor and a default cross-family (grok) judge, cost-gated spend, and pre-registration discipline. Wraps a rented execution substrate (promptfoo, version-pinned; native fallback) under a bespoke causal + pre-registration layer no commercial eval tool provides.
